info.title: DotNetOpenApiExtract.Cli
info.description: CLI tool that extracts OpenAPI specifications from compiled .NET assemblies via static reflection — no application startup required

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Extract an OpenAPI specification from a compiled .NET assembly without running the application

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the .NET assembly DLL (produced by dotnet build)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: json or yaml [default: json]

options.name: --title
options.description: API title (default: assembly file name without extension)

options.name: --description
options.description: API description written to the info block

options.name: --xml
options.description: XML documentation file path (default: auto-detected next to the DLL)

options.name: --camel-case
options.description: Use camelCase property names in generated schemas [default: True]

options.name: --enum-as-string
options.description: Serialize enum values as strings instead of integers [default: False]

options.name: --exclude-path
options.description: Path prefix to exclude from the generated spec (can be specified multiple times)
